review_notes: The functions are generally well-aligned with Kubernetes network security controls. The naming convention mostly follows the established pattern, but one function required a slight adjustment for clarity and consistency. The functions correctly map to Kubernetes NetworkPolicy and service configurations, which are relevant to ISO27001 A.8.20.
naming_improvements: Ensure that 'restrict_external_access' specifies whether it pertains to ingress or egress for clarity.
title: Network Security
step1_reasoning: The ISO27001 A.8.20 control focuses on network security, which directly maps to Kubernetes NetworkPolicies and service configurations. NetworkPolicies can enforce ingress and egress restrictions, ensuring that pods are not open to the internet unless explicitly allowed. Additionally, restricting the use of LoadBalancer services can prevent exposing services directly to the internet without proper controls.
